debug_info.goal:
d : ℕ
i : Fin d
μ : Fin d → Measure ℝ
inst✝ : ∀ (i : Fin d), IsProbabilityMeasure (μ i)
f : ℝ → ℝ
hf : Integrable f (μ i)
⊢ ∫ (a : Fin d → ℝ), f (a i) ∂Measure.pi μ = ∫ (x : ℝ), f x ∂μ i

failed_attempts: rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i).aeMeasurable hf.aeStronglyMeasurable]
rw [← Measure.pi_map_eval μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i).aemeasurable hf.aeStronglyMeasurable]
exact integral_pi_apply i hf
exact integral_pi_proj i hf
exact Measure.integral_pi_proj i f
exact integral_pi_apply i hf
rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i) hf.aeStronglyMeasurable]
rw [← Measure.map_proj_pi μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i).aemeasurable hf]
rw [← Measure.map_proj_pi μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i) hf.aestronglyMeasurable]
exact integral_pi_apply i hf.aeStronglyMeasurable
rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i) (Measure.map_eval_pi μ i ▸ hf.aeStronglyMeasurable)]
exact integral_pi_apply hf
exact integral_pi_apply i hf

rw [← Measure.map_pi_apply μ i] at hf ⊢
  exact integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i) hf.aeStronglyMeasurable
rw [← Measure.map_pi_proj μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i) hf.aeStronglyMeasurable]
exact integral_comp_proj hf
rw [← Measure.pi_map_eval μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i) hf.aeStronglyMeasurable]
exact integral_pi_apply i hf

rw [← integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i).aeStronglyMeasurable]
  simp [Measure.map_eval_pi μ i, measure_univ, hf.aeStronglyMeasurable]
rw [← Measure.map_proj_pi μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i) hf.aeStronglyMeasurable]
exact integral_comp_proj i hf
rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i) hf.aeStronglyMeasurable]
exact integral_pi_proj hf
rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i).aemeasurable hf.aestronglyMeasurable]

rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i, integral_map (measurable_apply i).aemeasurable]

rw [← Measure.pi_map_eval μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i) hf.aestronglyMeasurable]

rw [← Measure.map_eval_pi μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i) hf.aeStronglyMeasurable]
rw [← Measure.map_pi_apply μ i, integral_map (measurable_pi_apply i) (by rwa [Measure.map_pi_apply])]
exact integral_pi_apply i hf
